page_content:
Prerequisite: ENME476.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]

214 ENMT - Mechatronics Engineering

ENME479 Selected Topics in Mechanical Engineering (1-3 Credits) Covers current topics in mechanical engineering and related fields. Restriction: Permission of the Department of Mechanical Engineering. Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
